summary: Full backend and frontend testing for Rohith Puli Portfolio. All 14 backend API tests passed. Frontend loads correctly with all sections working. Admin panel accessible with session cookie. Gallery lightbox works. Lucky Wheel spins. Contact form is functional.

issues: No visible SPIN button - user must click the wheel center hub to spin. UX improvement: add a labeled SPIN button below the wheel for clarity
Name input has no 'name' attribute - minor, doesn't affect functionality

action_items: Consider adding a visible SPIN button below the lucky wheel for better UX discoverability
Minor: Add name attribute to contact form name input field
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 397 lines - acceptable but growing, consider splitting if admin features added
Contact email sends to submitter's email (to: [email]) instead of portfolio owner's email - may be intentional for confirmation but worth reviewing
No rate limiting on /api/wheel/spin or /api/contact - could be abused

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all sections load, all features functional, minor UX note on wheel spin button)

seed_data_creation: Created test MongoDB user and session: user_id=test-user-admin, session_token=test_session_admin_fixed, email=admin@test.com
test_credentials: session_token=test_session_admin_fixed (valid for 7 days from test run)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend 100% passing. Admin panel tested with MongoDB session cookie (test_session_admin_fixed). All portfolio sections render: Hero, About, Projects (Swiper carousel), Gallery (bento grid + lightbox), Resume, Lucky Wheel (SVG spin), Contact form, Footer with social links. Gallery lightbox works on click. Wheel spin works (click center hub). Admin panel has sidebar nav: Hero, About, Projects, Gallery, Resume, Contact, Wheel - all editable.
